name: Generative AI Summer Bootcamp — Merit
description: Strong completion: a solid, deployed Generative AI project (deliverables score ≥ 50/70).
creator: did:web:yazeedalrubyli.github.io:genai-bootcamp-credentials

criteria.narrative: Awarded to participants who completed the 4-week Generative AI Summer Bootcamp (40 training hours) and shipped a working, publicly deployed capstone project, independently assessed against the published rubric.
